safest_plan.entry_basis: Top of the chart's accumulation band — cyan line ~410 (labelled 0.618 / 'Whole DCA area for me'), with deeper adds marked at 399 and 393; confirmed by zero_live Jun 15 'spot re-accumulation zone'. NOT 430, which the grade mislabelled as entry but the live note and chart treat as resistance.

targets.basis: zero_hub grade TP1 / chart red line ~480
zero_hub grade TP2 (lower edge of chart take-profit zone)

safest_plan.stop_basis: Below the ~350-330 point-of-balance band on the chart; a daily close under 330 breaks the accumulation structure (next reference is the ~290 untested breaker).

stance_by_source.summary: Accumulate patiently in the re-accumulation zone; 430 is overhead resistance to clear, not a buy level.
Daily chart marks a buy/DCA zone at 410/399/393 below price, deeper balance band at 350-330, and a take-profit zone from ~480 up to 650.
Graded setup (partial, 6/10): targets 480, 590, 607, 635, 650; entry field read as 430 but no invalidation given.

conflicts: The earlier grade lists 430 as the entry, but the newer Jun 15 live note and the chart both treat 430 as overhead resistance — the actual buy area is the 410/399/393 DCA zone below the current price (image wins).

The grade gives no invalidation; the chart's structural stop sits below the 350-330 balance band, far under the buy zone, so reward-to-risk to the first target (480) is under 1:1 — only the deeper 590-650 targets justify the risk on a long hold.
plain_english: Everyone here is on the same side: corn is in a slow buying/accumulation phase, not a fast trade. The chart marks the place to buy as the 410-393 area just below today's price of about 423, with a much deeper backup band around 350-330. The 430 level above is a ceiling to push through, not an entry — an earlier note got that backwards. Since price is currently above the buy zone and the guidance is to be patient, the move is to wait for a dip into 410-393 to start buying in pieces, aiming up toward 480 first and 590-650 over time, and treating a daily close below 330 as the sign the plan is wrong.
